tool_args.label: Offset Bus Lane, Lexington Ave 96th St to 60th St

payload.description: Shift bus lane from west curb to offset position, in effect at all times

payload.location_text: 86th St, 79th St, 72nd St, 63rd St, 60th St on Lexington Ave
payload.description: Add southbound right-turn bays to keep bus lane clear at heavy right turn locations, removes ~3-5 parking spaces per intersection

tool_args.label: Turn Bays at 68th St and 60th St

payload.location_text: 68th St and 60th St on Lexington Ave
payload.description: Add southbound left-turn bay and eastbound right-turn bay at 68th St, add westbound left-turn bay at 60th St, removes ~3-4 parking spaces per location

normalized_location.raw_text: 68th St and 60th St on Lexington Ave

payload.location_text: Lexington Ave, E 59th St to E 96th St
payload.description: Add commercial meters to improve curb access and reduce double parking; updated weekday regulations for generic commercial, small stores/restaurants, and large retail chain

normalized_location.raw_text: Lexington Ave, E 59th St to E 96th St

tool_args.label: Bus Boarding Platforms at M101 Limited Stops

payload.location_text: 79th St, 72nd St (potential 2019/2020); 96th St, 86th St, 68th St (potential future)
payload.description: Install bus boarding platforms at M101 Limited stops to speed boarding, ensure bus aligns with curb, and add pedestrian space

normalized_location.raw_text: 79th St, 72nd St (potential 2019/2020); 96th St, 86th St, 68th St (potential future)

tool_args.label: Lexington Ave Identified as Priority 2019 Project

payload.claim_text: Lexington Ave identified as priority 2019 project due to: slow bus speeds, unreliable bus travel times, high ridership, high volume of buses
payload.subject: Lexington Ave

payload.claim_text: Often blocked by vehicles due to intense curb activity
payload.subject: Lexington Ave curbside bus lane (96th St to 30th St)

payload.claim_text: Current street design does not effectively serve these riders
payload.subject: Lexington Ave street design

payload.claim_text: Traffic impacts of new bus lane alignment largely mitigated by: new turn bays at 68th St, 63rd St; signal modifications at 79th St, 72nd St, 68th St, 63rd St, 60th St; updated curb/meter allocations to reduce double parking
payload.subject: Lexington Ave bus lane alignment

payload.claim_text: Proposed design will improve bus speeds and reliability for thousands of daily bus riders, enable loading during peak period along west curb, improve curb access for local businesses by updating regulations, have minimal impact on traffic flow
